channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Oga Obinna shares his mother’s concerns about his relationship with Miss P
item.description: Media personality Oga Obinna has opened up about a personal matter involving his alleged relationship with singer Miss P, revealing that his mother is not fully supportive of it. Speaking during a liv...

item.title: DOST Secretary Renato Solidum Tops 2025 Cabinet Salary Report
item.description: The Commission on Audit (COA) has released its 2025 Report on Salaries and Allowances (ROSA), revealing that Department of Science and Technology (DOST) Secretary Renato Solidum Jr. remains the highes...

item.title: Federal High Court Set To Hear Case On Goodluck Jonathan’s Eligibility For 2027 Election
item.description: A Federal High Court for Abuja don schedule to hear one suit wey wan stop former President Goodluck Jonathan from entering the 2027 presidential election. The case na Johnmary Jideobi, one lawyer, bri...

item.title: Three Police Officers Killed in Kariega Home Shooting by Ex-Partner
item.description: In a tragic incident in Kariega, Eastern Cape, three police officers lost their lives following a late-night shooting at a private residence on Rudman Street. The suspect, a male constable, forced his...

item.title: Malibongwe Mdwaba says goodbye to Shongwe Radebe on Skeem Saam after a challenging season
item.description: Actor Malibongwe Mdwaba has officially announced his departure from SABC 1’s long-running soapie 'Skeem Saam', where he portrayed the complex character Shongwe Radebe. Taking to Instagram, Mdwaba shar...

item.title: Tanzanian High Court denies Standard Chartered extra time to appeal IPTL ruling
item.description: Arusha. The High Court of Tanzania, Commercial Division, has turned down a request from Standard Chartered Bank Hong Kong Limited and Standard Chartered Bank Malaysia Berhad to get more time to file a...

item.title: Willie Revillame Responds to Claims from Former Intern Amid Controversy
item.description: Television host and entertainer Willie Revillame recently addressed comments from a former intern, who had allegedly made negative remarks about him publicly. In a strong response, Revillame expressed...

item.title: Tripura Board TBSE Class 10 and 12 Results 2026: Marksheet Download and Toppers Information
item.description: The TBSE (Tripura Board of Secondary Education) results for Class 10 and Class 12 for the year 2026 were expected to be published online, providing students access to their marksheets, pass percentage...

item.title: Sydney Lord Mayor Faces Backlash Over Ban on Pro-Palestine Event
item.description: Sydney's Lord Mayor, Clover Moore, recently came under scrutiny for prohibiting a pro-Palestine event organised by the group Stop the War on Palestine at a city venue in Darlington. The planned event,...

item.title: Benue APC Factions Remain Divided Ahead of 2027 Elections, Says Party Chieftain
item.description: Inside Benue State APC, wahala no dey end as factions wey dey support Governor Hyacinth Alia and SGF George Akume never resolve their matter. APC big man Napoleon Otache talk say peace never return de...

item.title: Sen. Lacson calls for Senate inquiry into alleged PSA corruption
item.description: Senator Panfilo Lacson has urged the Senate Blue Ribbon Committee to conduct a thorough investigation into alleged corruption within the Philippine Statistics Authority (PSA). The call comes amid repo...

item.title: Labour Party Faces Major Setbacks as Reform UK Gains Ground in Local Elections
item.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer's Labour Party experienced significant setbacks in early results from local elections, reflecting voter dissatisfaction just two years after a landslide general ele...

item.title: Alaska Fjord Experiences Second-Tallest Recorded Tsunami After Landslide
item.description: On 10 August 2025, Tracy Arm Fjord in southeastern Alaska experienced a massive localised tsunami triggered by a landslide, reaching an estimated height of 481 metres, higher than the Empire State Bui...

item.title: Lagos Ports Receive 16 Vessels Carrying Fuel, Crude Oil, and Industrial Supplies
item.description: Commercial shipping activities for Lagos ports dey remain very strong as vessels wey dey carry petroleum products, food items, and industrial cargoes continue to show. According to the Nigerian Ports ...

item.title: Georgia Man Faces Federal Charges for Threatening Former Officials on Social Media
item.description: Elliott Owen Schroer, a man from Georgia, has been indicted on multiple federal charges for allegedly posting violent and graphic threats against former Trump administration officials, including ex-Ho...

item.title: Maharashtra SSC Class 10 Results 2026 Declared by MSBSHSE

item.description: The Women Deliver 2026 conference in Melbourne brought together 6,000 participants from 189 countries, including prominent leaders such as Julia Gillard, Jacinda Ardern, Helen Clark, and Justin Trudea...

item.title: Tanzania Plans to Expand Bee Products Exports to Asia and Africa
item.description: Tanzania dey ready to take advantage of di fast-growing global bee products industry, wey currently dey worth about $18 billion. Demand from countries like India and China dey open new chances for loc...

item.title: U.S. Strikes Target Iranian Drone Launch and Coastal Defense Sites
item.description: American military strikes on Thursday targeted Iranian drone launch sites, coastal defense cruise missile sites, and radars near the Strait of Hormuz. The attack was part of a broader exchange of fire...

item.title: David Attenborough at 100: A Retrospective of His Most Remarkable Television Moments
item.description: As David Attenborough celebrates his 100th birthday, this article reflects on his unparalleled career in natural history television. From his early work in the 1950s, producing programmes like 'Coelac...
